summary: Phase 3 ~80% complete. Full combat system overhaul with tiered punch/sword mechanics, recruit KO system, combat mode toggle, fighting stances, and item raise animation. All visual polish done (parallax, lighting, particles, character animation, camera, hit feedback, movement polish). All 5 levels revamped. UI/UX complete (HUD, story, pause, level select, game over). Remaining: Audio, Performance/QA, Launch.
focus_areas_next_session: Combat & animation polish — guard attack animations, death animations, combat feedback juice
Player/guard sprite improvements — more detailed pixel art, smoother transitions
Parallax background enhancements — more visual variety, additional element types
Dynamic lighting polish — colored light interactions, shadow casting improvements

PlatformGame.ts.description: Main game file. Game loop, level loading, collision, combat resolution, rendering orchestration, all UI states.
PlatformGame.ts.read_strategy: Too large for single read — use offset/limit in ~500 line chunks

key_sections.game_state_machine: States: menu, level_select, playing, level_intro, story, level_complete, victory, game_over, paused
key_sections.combat_resolution: Tiered routing: sword vs punch × guard type (recruit/soldier/veteran/captain/shadow)
key_sections.input_handling: Edge detection via wasPressed booleans. Shift=combat toggle, Ctrl=block(combat)/dash(non-combat), Space=attack
key_sections.death_flow: player.die() → dying anim → dead → deathInterstitial → game_over → endGame()
key_sections.item_pickup: pendingItemRaise flag triggers item_raise animation after story dialogue ends

Player.ts.description: Player entity with combat mode, stances, item raise animation, flash rendering, movement polish.
Player.ts.states: idle, run, jump, fall, combat_idle, attack, block, hurt, dying, dead, item_raise

key_systems.combat_mode: inCombatMode boolean toggled by Shift. 50% move speed, no jumping, combat_idle state
key_systems.fighting_stances: Fist stance (boxing guard, arms up) or sword stance (blade angled 45° diagonal, lead arm forward)
key_systems.fist_block: X-guard arms crossed when blocking without sword
key_systems.combat_shuffle: Leg animation when moving in combat_idle (sin wave offset)
key_systems.item_raise: 1.5s animation raising sword overhead with glow effect, triggered after pickup dialogue
key_systems.flash_rendering: Offscreen HTMLCanvasElement with source-atop compositing. Uses translate(bufW, 0) for left-facing flip.
key_systems.movement_polish: Coyote time (100ms), jump buffering (100ms), variable jump height (0.65 cut)

Guard.ts.description: Guard AI with 5 types, KO system, punch immunity tiers, boss phases.
Guard.ts.states: idle, patrol, chase, attack, stunned, blocking, hurt, dying, dead, knocked_out

recruit.punch_response: Takes 1 damage per punch, KO at 0 HP (recovers after 5s). Sword = 3 damage (instant kill, permanent)

soldier.punch_response: No HP damage. punchHitCount tracks hits; every 3rd punch → stagger + 24px knockback

captain.special: L3 boss. Door locked until defeated. Slowmo + CAPTAIN_DEATH shake on kill

shadow.special: L5 boss. 3 phases (>70% defensive, 30-70% aggressive, <30% desperate). SHADOW_DEATH shake on kill

key_methods.knockOut(): Recruit-only. Enters knocked_out state, 5s timer, recovers to patrol with full HP
key_methods.stagger(): Brief stun + flash. Used for soldier punch stagger
key_methods.punchHitCount: Tracks cumulative punches for soldier stagger threshold

ParallaxBackground.ts.description: 5 level-themed backgrounds with 4 parallax depth layers, 25+ procedural element types

DynamicLighting.ts.description: 6 light types (torch, crystal, spectral, owl, player_torch, moonlight) with progressive darkness per level

Camera.ts.description: Smooth follow with look-ahead, 9 shake presets, screen flash

LevelData.ts.description: 5 levels (50×15 to 80×22 tiles). All revamped. L5 fully redesigned with 4 zones.

StoryData.ts.description: Story triggers and dialogue. Types: level_start, tile_proximity, position, boss_alert/defeat/phase, kael_response, victory, defeat

combat_system.overview: Shift toggles inCombatMode. Works with or without Ancient Blade. Must be in combat mode to attack (punch or sword).

combat_mode_effects.state: combat_idle (stays in this state even while moving)

with_sword.stance: Sword angled 45° diagonal (stepped pixels), lead arm forward, rear arm tucked
with_sword.attack: Sword swing — works on all guard types

without_sword.stance: Boxing guard — fists raised at chest height, slight forward lean
without_sword.attack: Punch (12×20 hitbox, 0.25s) — tiered by guard type

damage_routing.punch_vs_recruit: 1 damage per punch, KO at 0 HP (5s recovery, not permanent)
damage_routing.punch_vs_soldier: No damage. Every 3rd punch → stagger + 24px knockback

combat_system.knockback: Position-based direction: guard.centerX >= player.centerX ? right : left

item_progression.ancient_blade_W: L1: Enables sword attack in combat mode. Behind gate puzzle.
item_progression.iron_armor_A: L2: +2 max health (3→5). Visual armor on sprite.
item_progression.dash_boots_V: L3: Ctrl outside combat mode = dash with i-frames.
item_progression.crystal_heart_K: L4: Sword deals 2x damage. Blade glows pink.
item_progression.persistence: Items saved to localStorage. New Game resets. Death keeps items.
item_progression.pickup_flow: Collect item → story dialogue → item_raise animation (1.5s sword overhead)

level_5_design.name: Heart of Crystal

zones.A_descent: Cols 1-18: Dash boots platforming test — zigzag platforms, 3 chompers, spike gaps, loose floors
zones.B_gauntlet: Cols 19-36: Combat mastery — 3 veteran guards, spike pits, journal
zones.C_labyrinth: Cols 37-54: Puzzle mastery — wall columns at 44/54, Red+Blue gate puzzles, switches on upper platforms
zones.D_shadow_arena: Cols 55-78: Open boss arena, Owl on pedestal (row 4 col 67), Shadow boss (row 19 col 67), door at col 78

level_5_design.entities: 5 guards, 26 gems, 3 HP potions, 1 max HP potion, 2 time crystals, 3 chompers, 10 skeletons, 9 spectral crystals, 14 torches, 2 inscriptions, 1 fallen seeker, 1 journal, 1 owl, 1 door

flash_rendering_pattern.critical_detail: For left-facing sprites, use translate(bufW, 0) NOT translate(this.width, 0). Buffer width includes padding.

controls.jump: Up or W (coyote time + jump buffer, disabled in combat mode)
controls.block: Ctrl (in combat mode — sword block or fist X-guard)
controls.dash: Ctrl (outside combat mode, requires Dash Boots)

phase3_progress.P3-1.3_particle_enhancements: DONE (7 effects: dust, sparks, shimmer, footstep, landing, death, owl)
phase3_progress.P3-1.4_character_animation: DONE (breathing, jump anticipation, squash, glow, stagger, death)
phase3_progress.P3-3.2_hit_feedback: DONE (white flash, directional knockback, scaled hit stop, boss feedback)
phase3_progress.P3-4_progression: DONE (score breakdown, leaderboard, level unlock persistence)
phase3_progress.P3-5_level_design: DONE (all 5 levels revamped, L5 fully redesigned)
phase3_progress.P3-6_ui_ux: DONE (HUD animations, story typewriter, pause menu, level select, game over)

P3-2_audio: Create/source music tracks (cavern ambience, boss themes, victory)
Create/source missing SFX (gem pickup, traps, story, level complete)
Hook boss fight music triggers + phase transitions

architecture_notes.PlatformGame.ts: Main game file, 4211 lines. Read in ~500 line chunks with offset/limit.
architecture_notes.Player.ts: Player entity, 1050 lines. States, combat mode, stances, rendering, movement polish.
architecture_notes.Guard.ts: Guard AI, 980 lines. 5 types, KO system, punch immunity tiers, boss phases.
architecture_notes.rendering_folder: ParallaxBackground.ts, Camera.ts, DynamicLighting.ts — self-contained classes instantiated in PlatformGame.
architecture_notes.edge_detection_pattern: Input tracked with wasPressed booleans. Check current && !wasPressed for press edge, !current && wasPressed for release edge.
architecture_notes.tile_map_validation: Use a Node.js script to validate all rows have correct column count. Windows find conflicts with unix — use findstr.
